title: Merge overlapping intervals
prompt: Implement `merge(intervals)` in solution_stub.py. Each interval is a [start, end] pair. Merge all overlapping or touching intervals and return the result as a list of [start, end] lists sorted by start. Intervals that merely touch (e.g. [1,4] and [4,5]) must be merged into [1,5]. The current version assumes the input is already sorted and merges incorrectly otherwise.
